name: Vilay Bende
about: I love building things that make life easier for users, teams, and businesses.

Over the last 2 years, I've worked as a Full Stack Developer building and scaling Shopify apps used by 10,000+ merchants, integrating OpenAI APIs into production systems, and shipping features end-to-end across React frontends, Node.js backends, and Google Cloud infrastructure.

I care about clean code, intuitive UX, and writing software that teams can maintain and users can depend on. Whether it's optimizing performance, reducing costs, or building a feature from scratch, I like owning things and seeing them through.
Always curious, always learning, and looking for teams that value thoughtful engineering and building products that actually matter.

experience: Built and scaled Shopify apps used by 10,000+ merchants, generating content for over 37 million products.
Optimized webhook handling using Google Pub/Sub and Redis queues, offloading heavy background processing to Cloud Run Functions to keep servers responsive.
Built an online menu management application using Next.js, React.js, Chakra UI, and Redux, reducing order processing time by an estimated 40%.
Developed a custom cart system supporting item level customizations like add-ons and special instructions, improving the overall ordering experience.
Built custom Shopify apps to optimize client experience and streamline store operations.
Created customizable tab and accordion components using Liquid and CSS, with 4 types of predefined layout options.
Designed user interfaces for web based strategic and board games using React.js, improving player engagement and accessibility by an estimated 30%.
Integrated real time client server communication using Socket.IO to enable smooth multiplayer gameplay across all game modes.
Founded a competitive programming club and grew it to 250+ students through workshops, coding contests, and one on one mentoring.
Led a 5 member team to design and deploy MIIC's official website, improving UX and accessibility for students and faculty.
